name: airfold-cli

metadata.name: airfold-cli
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
## Airfold CLI

Use it to manage your projects and call Airfold from your CI/CD pipelines.

### Install

```shell
pip install airfold-cli
```

### Usage

```shell
af --help
```

methods.name: airfold_cli.ui.UI.print_table
documentation:
Constructs a table to display a list of items.

Args:
    columns: The table columns.
    data: The list of items to display.
    title: The title of the table.

functions.name: airfold_cli.diff.diff
documentation:
Diff between local and remote objects.
 

Args:

    path: path to local object file(s), ('-' will read objects from stdin)

functions.name: airfold_cli.pipe.drop
documentation:
Delete pipe.
 

Args:
    ctx: Typer context
    name: pipe name
    dry_run: show plan without executing it
    force: force delete/overwrite even if data will be lost

functions.name: airfold_cli.pipe.ls
documentation:
List pipes.
 

Args:

functions.name: airfold_cli.pipe.query

Query pipe data.
 

Args:

functions.name: airfold_cli.pipe.rename
documentation:
Rename pipe.
 

Args:
    ctx: Typer context
    name: pipe name
    new_name: new pipe name
    dry_run: show plan without executing it
    force: force delete/overwrite even if data will be lost
@pipe_app.command("rename")

documentation:

Args:

    name: pipe name
    path: target directory to create files in, ('-' will dump to stdout)

classes.name: airfold_cli.tui.underline_bar.UnderlineBar
documentation:
Thin horizontal bar with a portion highlighted.

Args:

: highlight_range (tuple\[float, float\]): The range to highlight. Defaults to `(0, 0)` (no highlight)
  highlight_style (StyleType): The style of the highlighted range of the bar.
  background_style (StyleType): The style of the non-highlighted range(s) of the bar.
  width (int, optional): The width of the bar, or `None` to fill available width.

variables.name: airfold_cli.options.InteractivePromptOption
documentation:
If `True`, use interactive prompts in CLI commands. If `False`, no interactive
prompts will be used.

functions.name: airfold_cli.push.push
documentation:
Push object(s) into runtime database.
 

Args:
    ctx: Typer context
    path: path to local object file(s), ('-' will read objects from stdin)
    dry_run: show execution plan without executing it
    force: force delete/overwrite even if data will be lost
    rename: use `rename` strategy. Specify a single renamed object and its new name.

functions.name: airfold_cli.fmt.fmt
documentation:
Format local object files.
 

Args:
    ctx: Typer context
    path: path to local object file(s)
    dry_run: print formatted files to stdout without saving them
    overwrite: overwrite existing files
